reviews.review_description: This a fun game and would do better if it had multi-player, it is a must for these types of games in VR and on a monitor. It reminds me of F Zero more than Wipeout, having fun, hope for multi-player functions soon if it is being done.

reviews.review_title: This is a great game guys so...
reviews.review_description:
But no updates since March 2020.

Please show it the love it deserves and update with cloud save

Updated 2/2/21

The game started off very enjoyable with a fair enough variety and tracks and game modes to keep one entertained.  Though I would certainly wouldn’t turn down a multiplayer option.

I will say difficulty curve is a tad inconsistent and tier 3 tracks have proven more frustrating than fun unfortunately.  Which is a shame because I’d love to see the new content they added.  However they sadly locked it behind the next tier......and frankly I ended up giving up seeing the new content due to the roadblock in difficulty I hit.

Skip the motion controls they’re pretty much worthless in my opinion, extremely inferior to the standard ones and the twitch like reflexes the game seems to demand at higher tiers.

if you want a solo racing game grab it when it's on sale I'm not sure I'd recommend it at full price though.

At last, a decent racing game!  
As a fan of wipeout since its very beginning, I've been waiting and waiting for Occulus to release something similar. 
Plenty of shoot em ups, zombies and ninja warriors, but no  racing games,  why the wait!!!
Anyway, rant over.  I thoroughly enjoy this game,  and along with my BoxVR, I play this the most. It feeds my 'need for speed' addiction and tbe graphics are half decent.  Needless to say, it would be even better if Occulus were to release more racing games in the near future???
It’s fun, but it gets old. Not ones cup of tea I guess. I still had fun with it though
Best racing game on Oculus quest, it would be a six-star rating with multiplayer.

2nd  Best racing game so far and its pretty and  fast
Cannot wait for multiplayer.

developer_response.body: Only the second?! Multiplayer is something we're considering for the future.

reviews.review_description:
Graphics are nice, despite lacking diversity (see how Wipeout did it). Music is generic and blocky, without much flair (lacks leading melodies, see F-Zero). Sound FX are bad, really amateurish (please hire a proper sound designer, it’ll enhance PHYSICALITY/WEIGHT a lot). Also I miss proper collision visual effects (some sparks would be nice and are inexpensive to compute).

I understand these issues exists because it’s not a big budget title made by an experienced studio. So it’s all  pretty much forgivable.

What’s not forgivable are Hot Laps challenges. They have obviously miscalculated difficulty spikes and are too boring to have any fun trying to accomplish them.

Why make the less exciting gameplay mode 10 times harder than other modes? You see, game DESIGN is not about money, it’s about balance and fun. These things doesn’t necessarily cost more to produce, they’re based in good old common sense.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and bringing these issues up. Please keep an eye out for future updates where we'll be addressing some of the issues you have kindly raised.

reviews.review_description:
The game is a nice challenge but the developers need to make Hot Lap on the first tier a little more possible. I played the stage at least 10 times and still failed even using boost. If that can get fixed to make it possible to pass that would be great. 

Updated Review: Figured it out. Super fun but still very challenging at times. But that's a good thing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to leave a review. We're looking into a balance update but glad you figured it out!

reviews.review_description: This game is out of this world. Love sitting back after work drinking a beer and playing for hours around the track. Death lap is good to but you need to operate the controls more.

developer_response.body: We are glad that you are enjoying the title - please drink responsibly when operating your anti-grav vehicle!

reviews.review_description: This is without doubt the FASTEST Racer on the Quest with lots of game modes to get stuck into.

I don’t like steering with one hand and accelerating with the other. The ability to move around the controls across controllers would be awesome. I feel that both triggers should accelerate and grips should be breaks
Only played twice but I like it so far. I had worried about VR sickness with the twisting tracks? But I haven't had even a hint of VR sickness.

reviews.review_title: fair price to buy, easy to play
reviews.review_description: I just bought it for 9.99, it is a good game, easy to play, no complicated setting, I don't feel any motion sickness, fair price

I find it a pretty fun mindless activity, and the price is right. 
But if someone asked my opinion on how this good game could be improved:

• Give access to more pod racers at first
• Introduce acceleration as a pod feature
• Give boosters to be used sparingly to get back to speed
• Increase top speed in a side race so we could go breakneck if we wanted
• Make weapons easier to aim and use/more variety of weapons (on the combat missions)
• GIVE SOUND OPTIONS so we can turn the music down but not off, and decrease the verbal warning audio.
• Introduce hidden shortcuts in some tracks

It's a good race game as it is, definitely.

I’m a big fan of WipEout. I mean a BIG fan. So I downloaded this thinking ‘here we go another WipEout clone...’ and prepared to be disappointed. In short it’s a bit WipEout-ish, but it occupies its own niche, with tubular tracks and crazy angles. The handling is pretty straightforward and no pratting around with air breaks made a welcome change. The immersion is epic, and once you’ve played it a while, the mild initial motion sickness passes. I’m only a day in, but this, to me, has lasting appeal and it’s a nice game to play seated.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback Firchild!

reviews.review_title: A beautiful racing game on the quest!
reviews.review_description: This game has the best music, The graphics are good, and the controls are soooo miraculous!! As a vr player, I would say thank you for the awesome supersonic experience! I am soo hyped up for the omega update and a online multiplayer mode!!!

I’ve been eyeing this game for a while because there are only a few racing games for the quest. The devs put this on sale so now is the time! I’ve been enjoying it for sure! I’m not a wipeout fan but this game is on a whole other level than wipeout...

I have been excited to see something like Wipeout on the Quest since picking it up a few months ago.  I enjoyed Void Racer on the GO and this is much better than that game.

The tracks are absolutely nuts and the fact that you can be racing on one side of them while your competitors are racing on the other is bonkers.

As some others have said the Time Trial sections of the Career are challenging. You have to really figure out as close to perfect of a run as you can. Took me at least a dozen tries on the first one. 

If you get vertigo this is one to avoid as even on the Comfortable setting I get a queasy stomach on certain tracks. Still exhilarating enough for me to push through. 

The graphics have a great look to them and I enjoy the sound and soundtrack as well.

I say this is a must buy for fans of futuristic racers.
Its just a really bad game, never buy
